title: Student Discipline: Placement in a Disciplinary Alternative Education Setting
description: Conroe ISD's guidelines for placing students in a Disciplinary Alternative Education Program (DAEP) explain when and how the district may move a student to a separate educational setting as a consequence for certain serious behaviors. The policy outlines the process the district follows, including any required reviews and the rights students and parents have during that process. Understanding these guidelines helps families know what to expect if a student is ever considered for this type of placement.
